data.title: ETF money exits Bitcoin and Ether, flow shifts toward Solana, XRP
data.description:
Bitcoin and Ether exchange-traded funds extended their run of outflows to end the week in the red. The global digital assets market too looked clueless as Bitcoin failed to hold over the $90k mark. Investors continued to rotate money towards Solana and XRP. The global crypto market cap surged marginally to remain above $3. 02 trillion. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/etf-money-exits-bitcoin-and-ether-flow-shift/

data.description:

Wall Street fund managers who once ignored these stocks are now going heavy. They’re not doing […]

data.title: Stablecoins Expected to Enhance Cross-Border Business Payments
data.description: Agora's CEO Nick van Eck predicts a rise in the use of stablecoins in real-world business applications, especially for cross-border transactions. According to NS3.AI, van Eck emphasizes the importance of stablecoins in simplifying enterprise payments across various nations. This shift indicates a broader trend where stablecoins are transitioning from speculative assets to practical financial instruments for businesses.

data.title: Goldman Sachs Paid CEO Solomon $47Mn In 2025
data.description:
Goldman Sachs paid CEO David Solomon $47 million last year, up 21% from 2024 and his highest remuneration since he took the helm at the Wall Street bank in 2018.
source: https://catenaa.com/industries/financials/goldman-sachs-paid-ceo-solomon-47mn-in-2025/

data.title: UK retail investors are right to take issue with FCA’s crypto ISAs
data.description:

Five years ago, the Financial Conduct Authority took the opposite stance. In 2020, the FCA banned retail investors from buying crypto derivatives and exchange-traded notes. Officials said prices […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/uk-retail-investors-issue-with-crypto-isas/

data.title: Data Availability Is the Real Bottleneck Nobody Talks About
data.description:
In late 2025, a major rollup ecosystem didn’t get hacked or drained. It simply stalled in a quieter, more dangerous way. Sequencers kept producing blocks, bridges kept taking deposits, and apps kept flashing “success. ” However, behind the scenes, independent verifiers temporarily lost access to critical transaction data
source: https://www.techgaged.com/data-availability-is-the-real-bottleneck-nobody-talks-about/

data.title: Gold Becomes The Whale Safe Haven As Bitcoin Takes A Back Seat
data.description:
A large investor shifted funds into tokenized gold this week, and Bitcoin felt the impact. Prices dipped while a whale quietly bought millions in XAUT, a gold-backed token, signaling a short-term move toward traditional hedges. Related Reading: Bitcoin Influencers Get Spotlight In X’s New ‘Starterpacks’ Whales Move Into Tokenized Gold According to on-chain trackers, one address moved $1. 53 million in USDC into Hyperliquid to buy XAUT
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/gold-becomes-the-whale-safe-haven-as-bitcoin-takes-a-back-seat/

data.title: GameStop Moves Entire Bitcoin Treasury to Coinbase, Raising Sale Concerns
data.description:
A transfer involving GameStop’s full Bitcoin position has put the company’s crypto treasury under close scrutiny. The firm has moved all 4,710 BTC to Coinbase Prime, a platform typically associated with institutional execution and large-scale selling activity rather than long-term custody. The Bitcoin was acquired in May last year for $504
source: https://www.ethnews.com/gamestop-moves-entire-bitcoin-treasury-to-coinbase-raising-sale-concerns/

data.title: ETHZilla Sells $114.5 Million in Ethereum to Invest in Real-World Assets
data.description: ETHZilla, a treasury firm specializing in Ethereum, has sold more than $114.5 million worth of ETH in recent months. According to NS3.AI, the company is reallocating its capital to purchase real-world assets, such as jet engines, with the intention of tokenizing them on blockchain platforms. This strategy highlights an increasing trend of integrating traditional assets with blockchain technology through tokenization.

data.title: The Fed and US Treasury will not seeing eye-to-eye on the matter of yen intervention
data.description:
The yen surged by 1. 75% on Friday to 155. 63 per dollar, the biggest one-day rally since last year August, flipping what had been a brutal slide and making lawmakers in Tokyo jittery… again. Naturally, Wall Street traders weren’t quiet either. Many pointed to calls made by the New York Fed to several big financial firms, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/fed-and-treasury-on-the-matter-of-yen/
